initParmsData:
"
# TCQ information
tcq:\
 :ckpt.max.age=8:\
 :max.age=8:

# user exit information
user.exits:\
 :stats.exit.program=:\
 :security.exit.program=:\
 :file.open.exit.program=:

# Backup locations for automated upgrade
backup.locations:\
 :cd.backup=/opt/ibm/cdunix/SAPRMSS4/restore:\
 :emergency_restore.installers=/opt/ibm/cdunix/SAPRMSS4/ndm/bin:\
 :agent.backup=/opt/ibm/cdunix/SAPRMSS4/install/restore:

# Miscellaneous Parameters
ndm.pam:\
 :service=:
ndm.path:\
 :path=/opt/ibm/cdunix/SAPRMSS4:\
 :process.dir=/opt/ibm/cdunix/SAPRMSS4/process:

# Global copy parameters.
copy.parms:\
 :xlate.send=def_send.xlt:\
 :xlate.recv=def_recv.xlt:\
 :xlate.dir=/opt/ibm/cdunix/SAPRMSS4/ndm/xlate:\
 :continue.on.exception=y:\
 :ckpt.interval=2M:\
 :ulimit=N:

# C:D Port Check Ignore List
port.check:\
 :trusted.addr=:

# Remote CD nodes
rnode.listen:\
 :comm.info=10.165.0.76;1364:\
 :comm.transport=tcp:\
 :recid=SAPRMSS4:

# Miscellaneous Parameters
ndm.node:\
 :instance.id=f2635f4d-bd7e-4790-b0d6-48ddffa8c2aa:\
 :name=SAPRMSS4:

# Global runtask parameters.
runtask.parms:\
 :restart=y:

# Stat file info.
stats:\
 :log.select=n:\
 :file.size=1048576:\
 :max.age=8:\
 :log.commands=y:

proc.prio:\
 :default=10:

# FASP parameters
fasp:\
 :listen.ports=(24100,23700-25000):

# C:D File agent parameters
cd.file.agent:\
 :cdfa.enable=y:

# Install agent parameters
install.agent:\
 :osa.rest.url=https;//ccmservices.int-dev.sobeys.com/osa/events/post:\
 :agent.port=1365:\
 :agent.installation_id=:\
 :installer.location=/opt/ibm/cdunix/SAPRMSS4/install/downloads:\
 :agent.enable=y:\
 :osa.disable=n:

# S3 IO Exit parameters
file.ioexit:\
 :library=/opt/ibm/cdunix/SAPRMSS4/ndm/lib/libcdjnibridge.so:\
 :name=s3:\
 :options=-Xmx640m \
  -Dcom.ibm.tools.attach.enable=no \
  -Djava.class.path=/opt/ibm/cdunix/SAPRMSS4/ndm/ioexit-plugins/s3/cd-s3-ioexit.jar com.aricent.ibm.mft.connectdirect.s3ioexit.S3IOExitFactory:\
 :home.dir=/opt/ibm/cdunix/SAPRMSS4/ndm/ioexit-plugins/s3:

# Authenticator
authentication:\
 :server.program=/opt/ibm/cdunix/SAPRMSS4/ndm/bin/ndmauths:\
 :server.keyfile=/opt/ibm/cdunix/SAPRMSS4/ndm/security/keys.server:

"

"[Miscellaneous Commands]
server.path=E:\Program Files\ConnectDirect\Server\
proc.prio.default=10
exec.prio.default=7
download.dir=E:\Program Files\ConnectDirect\Server\Download\
upload.dir=E:\Program Files\ConnectDirect\Server\Upload\
program.dir=E:\Program Files\ConnectDirect\Server\Program\
restrict.cmd=N
security.exit=<None>
notify.level=A
file.exit=<None>
event.log=All 
certificate.directory=E:\Program Files\ConnectDirect\Server\Secure+\Certificates
s+cmd.enforce.secure.connection=Y
disable.proxy.password.security=N
password.exit.dll=<None>
password.exit.hash=<None>
password.exit.appl.id=<None>
password.exit.policy.id=<None>
password.exit.url=<None>
password.exit.object=<None>
password.exit.safe=<None>
password.exit.user.defined=<None>

[Local Node Characteristics]
max.api.connects=16
tcp.api.inactivity.timeout=00:10:00
conn.retry.stwait=00:00:30
conn.retry.stattempts=3
conn.retry.ltwait=00:10:00
conn.retry.ltattempts=6
contact.name=<None>
contact.phone=<None>
descrip=<None>
name=DMNAT01
sess.pnode.max=2
sess.snode.max=2
sess.total=2
sess.default=1
netmap.check=N
node.check=B
proxy.attempt=N
protocol=TCP
tcp.api.port=10.155.114.43;1363
tcp.host.port=10.155.114.43;1364
udt33.host.port=0.0.0.0;1366
outgoing.address=<None>
tcp.src.ports=<None>
tcp.src.ports.list.iterations=1
udp.src.ports=<None>
udp.src.ports.list.iterations=1
comm.bufsize=65535
udt33.bufsize=65535
pacing.send.delay=00:00:00
pacing.send.count=0
tcp.crc=OFF
tcp.crc.override=N
udt33.crc=OFF
udt33.crc.override=N
tcp.max.time.to.wait=00:03:00
udt33.max.time.to.wait=00:03:00
tcp.window.size=0
fasp=(No,No)
fasp.bandwidth=0
fasp.policy=fair
fasp.filesize.threshold=1G
fasp.listen.ports=(23700-25000)
instance.id=553b270b-883c-4a88-8e93-940b985c4d43
runstep.max.time.to.wait=00:00:00
active.directory.enabled=N
quiesce.resume=N

[TCQ Information]
tcq.max.age=30
tcq.start=W
process.dir=E:\Program Files\ConnectDirect\Server\Process\
runtask.restart=N
conn.retry.exhaust.action=hold

[Global Copy Parameters]
ckpt.interval=10M
xlate.dir=E:\Program Files\ConnectDirect\Server\Xlate\
xlate.send=xlatesnd.cdx
xlate.recv=xlatercv.cdx
disable.cache=N
continue.on.exception=N
ecz.cmprlevel=1
ecz.windowsize=15
ecz.memlevel=4
strip.blanks=I
record.wrap=N
retry.msgids=<None>
retry.codes=<None>

[Statistics Information]
stat.max.age=7
log.select=N
log.commands=Y
stat.sort=Y

[License Information]
license.edition=SOLO
license.type=NON-PRODUCTION
license.pvu=0

[Install Agent]
agent.port=1365
osa.rest.url=https://ccmservices.int-dev.sobeys.com/osa/events/post
osa.disable=n
agent.enable=Y
agent.installation_id=0c7fb83a-7558-4c6f-8cda-2d40ae3a2870

[File Agent]
fileagent.enable=Y

[WebServices]
webservices.enable=Y
webservices.port=1368

[Port Check]
trusted.addr=<None>
"
